summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KingdomCraft landing page with admin panel, user management, and authentication system. Backend APIs mostly functional (13/14 passed), frontend UI working well with minor modal overlay issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when creating news

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks clicks on background elements, preventing tab navigation

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with status badge
Admin panel access and tab navigation
Admin can access site during maintenance mode
Profile page form elements and updates
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix news creation endpoint returning 500 error - check backend logs for /api/admin/news POST request. Minor: improve modal overlay z-index handling to prevent click blocking.
